seoDescription: Join the Kaizen & Coffee team in San Mateo and help create exceptional coffee experiences rooted in hospitality and continuous improvement.

lookingFor.title: Who we are
lookingFor.p1: We are always looking for individuals who share our obsession with quality and our genuine love for hospitality. You don't need to be a coffee champion to work here, but you do need to care deeply about the details.
lookingFor.p2: We value curiosity, empathy, and a strong work ethic. If you believe that a great cup of coffee and a warm interaction can change someone's day, you belong here.

items.name: Kaizen
items.description: We are never finished learning. We seek feedback and strive for daily refinement.

items.name: Radical Hospitality
items.description: We treat every guest like they are entering our home.

items.name: Precision
items.description: We respect the ingredients by preparing them with exacting standards.

openings.title: Current
openings.fallback: Don't see a role that fits? Send your resume to careers@kaizencoffee.com and tell us why you'd be a great addition to the team.
